gap_rows.reason: REPO-REVIEW-2 found wide direct-path usage and there is no single current doctrine for the virtual path layer.
setup guarantees exist, but there is no single current release doc for client/server/launcher/setup standalone guarantees.
cross-platform gate outputs exist, but there is no stable release-facing platform support matrix.
RepoX, AuditX, TestX, CompatX, and ARCH-AUDIT surfaces are documented in fragments rather than one convergence doc.
the old UI mode summary is contradictory and the current mode order only appears indirectly in AppShell and release-freeze docs.
